highlights.text: Private Sydney harbour yacht charter & coastal helicopter flight
Whitsunday private island & Gold Coast VIP theme park

itinerary.title: Luxury Australia Grand Expedition
itinerary.overview: Indulge in the absolute zenith of Southern Hemisphere opulence with TRAGUIN's crown jewel sovereign expedition. This luxury Australia holiday links exclusive harbour-side private charter vessels, ultra-luxury reef heli-tours, secluded private island retreats, and elite rainforest sanctuary stays. Includes comprehensive VIP arrivals, dedicated luxury ground logistics, priority fast-track entry protocols, and personal concierge managers throughout your journey.
itinerary.seo_title: AU-003 | Luxury Australia Grand Expedition | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 08 Nights / 09 Days Australia expedition (AU-003): Sydney harbour charter, Daintree retreat, Great Barrier Reef helicopter, Whitsunday Islands, and Gold Coast elite finale.

highlights.text: Great Barrier Reef Private Heli Expedition
Gold Coast VIP Theme Park Fast-Track

days.title: Arrival in Sydney & Private Harbour Charter
days.description: VIP airfield greeting and ultra-luxury hotel transfer. Evening private charter yacht sunset cruise past Opera House and Harbour Bridge.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airfield greeting, private luxury vessel sunset harbor charter
Evening Experience: Welcome multi-course dinner at premier harbor-front venue
Overnight Stay: Sydney Harbour (Ultra-Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Gourmet Tasting Menu Welcome Dinner

days.title: Private Opera House & Skyline Panoramic Trail
days.description: Private Opera House VIP tour and private helicopter flight over Bondi and Manly cliffs.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Opera House VIP private guided tour, private coastal helicopter flight
Overnight Stay: Sydney Harbour (Ultra-Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Casual Coastal Bistro Lunch

days.title: Fly to Cairns & Daintree Luxury Retreat
days.description: Flight to Cairns and transfer to ultra-luxury Daintree Rainforest sanctuary with private canopy walk.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private executive transit to Daintree Rainforest, guided canopy walk
Overnight Stay: Port Douglas / Daintree (Luxury Boutique Rainforest Retreat)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Rainforest Gastronomy Dinner

days.title: Great Barrier Reef Private Helicopter Expedition
days.description: Private helicopter over the reef with sand cay landing and exclusive snorkeling in sapphire waters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private helicopter reef flight, private sand cay snorkeling session
Overnight Stay: Port Douglas / Daintree (Luxury Boutique Rainforest Retreat)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Gourmet Reef Picnic Lunch

days.title: Whitsunday Islands Private Escape
days.description: Flight to Whitsundays. Afternoon on Whitehaven Beach with pristine silica sand.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private island transit, Whitehaven Beach exploration
Overnight Stay: Whitsunday Islands (Ultra-Luxury Private Island Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Island Beachside Dinner

days.title: Isolated Beach Gala & Stargazing
days.description: Private vessel to secret beach picnic. Candlelight dinner under southern stars with fine wine.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private luxury beach picnic, sunset stargazing gala
Overnight Stay: Whitsunday Islands (Ultra-Luxury Private Island Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Grand Farewell Candlelight Dinner

days.title: Fly to Gold Coast & Elite Surf Retreat
days.description: Fly to Gold Coast ultra-luxury beachfront resort with private cabana access at Surfers Paradise.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Flight transit, beachfront relaxation with private cabana access
Overnight Stay: Gold Coast (Premium Beachfront Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Theme Park Gala & Farewell Evening
days.description: Gold Coast theme park with VIP fast-track access. Grand finale private beach-terrace dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Theme park VIP fast-track tickets
Evening Experience: Grand farewell dinner party event
Overnight Stay: Gold Coast (Premium Beachfront Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Farewell Australia
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before private departure transfer with priority luggage handling.
activities: Transfers: Private luxury van departure transfer, priority luggage handling
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in world-renowned ultra-luxury harbor, rainforest, and private island suites
Full ground transits in private high-end chauffeur vehicles
Private luxury yacht charter in Sydney and Great Barrier Reef helicopter expedition
VIP skip-the-line Opera House entry and Gold Coast priority fast-track park access
Dedicated 24/7 on-call travel expert concierge and local destination managers
International flight tickets and Australia entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, hotel room service, laundry, and mini-bar billing
Tipping, porterage fees, or optional sightseeing not mentioned in the flow
